title: yosys-smtbmc: Error when using --stdt option
body:
I am using symbiyosys and when I add --stdt option to the smtbmc engine it crashes. 

Input files:
[test_case.zip](https://github.com/YosysHQ/yosys/files/1876592/test_case.zip)

trigger_rules.sby:
```
[options]
mode prove

[engines]
smtbmc --stdt yices

[script]
verific -vhdl trigger_rules.vhd
verific -sv formal_tb.sv
verific -import testbench
prep -top testbench

[files]
trigger_rules.vhd
formal_tb.sv
```
formal_tb.sv:
```SystemVerilog
module testbench (
  input clk
);
  Trigger_Rules uut (
    .clk  (clk),
    .reset  (reset),
    .clock_counter_out(clock_counter_out)
  );

  always @(posedge clk)
    assert (clock_counter_out == 0);

endmodule
```
trigger_rules.vhd
```VHDL
library ieee;
use ieee.std_logic_1164.all;
use ieee.numeric_std.all;
library work;

entity Trigger_Rules is
    port(
        clk                        : in  std_logic;
        reset                      : in  std_logic;
        clock_counter_out          : out std_logic_vector(15 downto 0));

end entity Trigger_Rules;

architecture Trigger_Rules_arch of Trigger_Rules is

    signal clock_counter                  : std_logic_vector(15 downto 0);

begin

    clock_counter_out <= clock_counter;

    clock_count : process(clk)
    begin
        if rising_edge(clk) then
            if reset = '1' then
                clock_counter <= (others => '0');
            else
                clock_counter <= std_logic_vector(unsigned(clock_counter) + x"0001");
            end if;
        end if;
    end process clock_count;

end Trigger_Rules_arch;
```
